sql.where:
p.USE_YN = 'Y' AND p.APPROVE_STATE = 'APPROVED'
AND p.PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE'
AND ( p.PAGE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{req.search} || '%' OR p.CREATE_USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{req.search} || '%' )

choose.when: ORDER BY p.PAGE_ID ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.PAGE_NAME ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.CREATE_USER_NAME ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.BEGINNING_DATE ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.EXPIRED_DATE ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INNER_QRY.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM ( SELECT h.INSTANCE_ID AS instanceId, s.INSTANCE_NAME AS instanceName, s.INSTANCE_IP AS instanceIp, s.INSTANCE_PORT AS instancePort, h.FILE_ID AS fileId, h.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, h.FILE_CRC_VALUE AS fileCrcValue, h.LAST_MODIFIER_ID AS lastModifierId, h.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME AS lastModifiedDtime FROM FWK_CMS_FILE_SEND_HIS h JOIN FWK_CMS_SERVER_INSTANCE s ON h.INSTANCE_ID = s.INSTANCE_ID
ORDER BY h.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC ) INNER_QRY WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_CMS_FILE_SEND_HIS h JOIN FWK_CMS_SERVER_INSTANCE s ON h.INSTANCE_ID = s.INSTANCE_ID
SELECT PAGE_HTML FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND APPROVE_STATE = 'APPROVED' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE'
SELECT 'Y' FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND IS_PUBLIC = 'Y' AND EXPIRED_DATE IS NOT NULL AND EXPIRED_DATE < SYSDATE

SELECT FILE_ID FROM ( SELECT FILE_ID FROM FWK_CMS_FILE_SEND_HIS WHERE FILE_ID LIKE #{pageId} || '\_v%.html' ESCAPE '\' AND FILE_ID NOT LIKE '%\_expired.html' ESCAPE '\' ORDER BY LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT INSTANCE_ID AS instanceId, INSTANCE_IP AS instanceIp, TO_CHAR(INSTANCE_PORT) AS instancePort FROM FWK_CMS_SERVER_INSTANCE WHERE ALIVE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY INSTANCE_ID
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO FWK_CMS_FILE_SEND_HIS tgt USING ( SELECT #{instanceId} AS INSTANCE_ID, #{fileId} AS FILE_ID FROM DUAL ) src ON (tgt.INSTANCE_ID = src.INSTANCE_ID AND tgt.FILE_ID = src.FILE_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET FILE_SIZE = #{fileSize}, FILE_CRC_VALUE = #{crcValue}, LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), LAST_MODIFIER_ID = #{userId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (INSTANCE_ID, FILE_ID, FILE_SIZE, FILE_CRC_VALUE, LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME, LAST_MODIFIER_ID) VALUES (#{instanceId}, #{fileId}, #{fileSize}, #{crcValue}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{userId})
